Germany have progressed from each of their last five FIFA World Cup knockout matches against South American nations since losing 2-0 to Brazil in the 2002 final. Paraguay, meanwhile, have lost all four
beIN SPORTS MAX 2.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la troisième rencontre entre l'Allemagne et le Paraguay, après que l'Allemagne a remporté un match de Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 1-0 en 2002 et un match nul 3-3 en amical en 2013. L'Allemagne s'est qualifiée lors de chacun de ses cinq derniers matches à élimination directe de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA contre des nations sud-américaines depuis sa défaite 2-0 contre le Brésil en finale de 2002.

Le Japon n'a gagné qu'une seule fois lors de ses quatorze matches contre le Brésil, toutes compétitions confondues.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc_en: Everyone knows the biggest stadiums in the world. But sometimes it's the smallest stadiums that are the most intimidating for players, due to their fans and their fervor. Several big names in football tell you about their experiences in these stadiums where it can sometimes be difficult to play.
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_fr: Tout le monde connaît les plus grands stades du monde.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Argentina and Algeria will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter was a June 2007 friendly – Argentina won 4-3 at Barcelona’s Camp Nou. Lionel Messi scored his first international brace in that match. Argentina’s first FIFA World Cup match against African opposition ended in a 1-0 defeat to Cameroon in 1990. Si
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: L'Argentine et l'Algérie se rencontreront pour la première fois en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

Their only previous encounter came in a September 2022 friendly in Vienna – Canada won 2-0 through goals from Cyle Larin and Jonathan David. beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Ce sera la première rencontre de Coupe du monde entre le Canada et le Qatar.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Ecosse vs Maroc - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Scotland and Morocco’s only previous encounter was in the group stages of the 1998 World Cup – Morocco won 3-0, their largest World Cup victory to date. Nine of Morocco’s last 12 World Cup matches have come against European teams. In fact, no side has played as many WC matches against European opposition since the 2018 tournament as Morocco.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: La seule rencontre précédente entre l’Écosse et le Maroc a eu lieu lors des phases de groupes de la Coupe du monde 1998 – le Maroc a gagné 3-0, sa plus grande victoire en Coupe du monde à ce jour.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Ce sera le 1 000e match de l'histoire de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Afrique du Sud vs Canada - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Huitièmes de finale
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ are broadcast live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
The FIFA World Cup 2026™ will be the 23rd edition of the tournament and the first to feature 48 teams and three host countries: Canada, Mexico and the USA.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Les 104 matchs de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™ sont diffusés en direct et en exclusivité sur beIN SPORTS avec un choix de studios et de commentaires en arabe, anglais et français.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Spain vs Saudi Arabia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: إسبانيا vs السعودية - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: فازت إسبانيا في جميع مواجهاتها الثلاثة السابقة مع السعودية، وسجلت تسعة أهداف واستقبلت شباكها هدفين.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Espagne vs Arabie Saoudite - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Spain have won all three of their previous meetings with Saudi Arabia, scoring nine goals and conceding two. This includes a 1-0 victory in their only FIFA World Cup encounter to date, in the group stages of the 2006 tournament. Saudi Arabia have lost 10 of their 11 FIFA World Cup matches against European opposition. The only exception took place i
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: L'Espagne a remporté ses trois précédentes rencontres contre l'Arabie saoudite, marquant neuf buts et en concédant deux.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Jordan vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: الأردن vs الجزائر - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: سيكون هذا أول لقاء بين الأردن والجزائر في كأس العالم FIFA.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Jordanie vs Algérie - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be Jordan and Algeria’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their last encounter was a friendly in Algeria in May 2004 – it ended 1-1. After winning their first ever encounter 6-0 in the Arab Cup in October 1974, Algeria are winless in their two meetings with Jordan since, losing 2-1 in the Arab Cup in July 1988 as well as the aforementioned fr
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Ce sera la première rencontre entre la Jordanie et l’Algérie en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: France vs Iraq - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: فرنسا vs العراق - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وسيكون هذا أول لقاء على الإطلاق بين فرنسا والعراق.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: France vs Irak - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the first ever encounter between France and Iraq. France’s two previous World Cup matches against teams from the West Asian Football Federation both ended in victories: 4-1 v Kuwait in 1982 and 4-0 v Saudi Arabia in 1998.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la toute première rencontre entre la France et l'Irak.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: South Africa vs Canada - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: جنوب أفريقيا ضد كندا - كأس العالم 2026 - دور الـ 32
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وهذا هو اللقاء الثاني على الإطلاق بين جنوب أفريقيا وكندا، حيث فاز منتخب بافانا بافانا بالمباراة الأخرى 2-0 في مباراة ودية عام 2007 في ديربان.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Afrique du Sud vs Canada - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Huitièmes de finale
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This is just the second ever meeting between South Africa and Canada, with Bafana Bafana winning the other 2-0 in a 2007 friendly in Durban. Canada have lost both of their competitive meetings with African nations, losing 2-0 to Cameroon in the 2001 Confederations Cup, and 2-1 to Morocco in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il ne s'agit que de la deuxième rencontre entre l'Afrique du Sud et le Canada, les Bafana Bafana ayant remporté l'autre 2-0 lors d'un match amical en 2007 à Durban.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Morocco vs Haiti - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: المغرب vs هايتي - كأس العالم 2026 - مرحلة المجموعات
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: وستكون هذه أول مواجهة على الإطلاق بين المغرب وهايتي.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Maroc vs Haïti - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Phase de Groupes
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the first ever encounter between Morocco and Haiti. Morocco’s only previous FIFA World Cup match against a team from CONCACAF was in the 2022 group stage; they won 2-1 against Canada. Meanwhile, this will be Haiti’s first World Cup match against African opposition.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Il s'agira de la toute première rencontre entre le Maroc et Haïti.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: The Last Word
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: الكلمة الأخيرة
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: كل يوم خلال كأس العالم FIFA 2026™، "الكلمة الأخيرة" هو تعليق الاستوديو النهائي على أحداث المباراة خلال الـ 24 ساعة الماضية.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Le dernier mot
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
Every day during the FIFA World Cup 2026™, “The Last Word” is the definitive studio comment on the match action from the previous 24 hours.
All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Chaque jour pendant la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™, « The Last Word » est le commentaire définitif du studio sur l'action du match des 24 heures précédentes.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: World Today
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: العالم اليوم
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: "العالم اليوم" هو استوديو يومي مباشر من beIN يتطلع إلى جميع مباريات كأس العالم FIFA 2026™ القادمة من الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية والمكسيك وكندا.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Le monde aujourd'hui
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
“World Today” is a live daily studio from beIN looking forward to all the upcoming FIFA World Cup 2026™ FIFA World Cup action from USA, Mexico and Canada.
All 104 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabic, English and French studio and match commentary.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: « World Today » est un studio quotidien en direct de beIN qui attend avec impatience toutes les prochaines actions de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™ aux États-Unis, au Mexique et au Canada.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Countdown
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: العد التنازلي
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: "العد التنازلي" هو استوديو تابع لـ beIN ليوم المباراة من بطولة كأس العالم لكرة القدم 2026™ ويبث مباشرة قبل استوديو ما قبل المباراة.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Compte à rebours
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en:
“Countdown” is a beIN match day studio from the FIFA World Cup 2026™ broadcast live ahead of the pre match studio. “Countdown” covers the arrival of the players, coaching staff and fans as they experience the matchday stadium and atmosphere for the first time.
All 104 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches are live and exclusive on beIN with a choice of Arabi
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: « Countdown » est un studio beIN de jour de match de la Coupe du Monde de la FIFA 2026™ diffusé en direct avant le studio d'avant-match.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Brazil vs Japan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: البرازيل ضد اليابان - كأس العالم 2026 - دور الـ 32
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: فازت البرازيل بجميع مبارياتها الأربع السابقة في كأس العالم ضد دول الاتحاد الآسيوي، بما في ذلك مباراة واحدة ضد اليابان في عام 2006. وعلى العكس من ذلك، حققت اليابان مرة واحدة فقط في خمس مواجهات سابقة في كأس العالم مع منتخبات أمريكا الجنوبية، بفوزها 2-1 على كولومبيا في عام 2018. وفازت اليابان مرة واحدة فقط في مبارياتها الأربع عشرة ضد البرازيل في جميع المسابقات.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Brésil vs Japon - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Huitièmes de finale
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Brazil have won all four of their previous FIFA World Cup games against AFC nations, including one against Japan in 2006. Conversely, Japan have only one once in five previous World Cup meetings with South American sides, a 2-1 victory over Colombia in 2018. Japan have won only once in their fourteen games against Brazil in all competitions. Howeve
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Le Brésil a remporté ses quatre précédents matches de Coupe du Monde de la FIFA contre des nations de l'AFC, dont un contre le Japon en 2006. À l'inverse, le Japon n'a remporté qu'une seule fois lors de ses cinq précédentes rencontres de Coupe du Monde contre des équipes sud-américaines, une victoire 2-1 contre la Colombie en 2018. Le Japon n'a gagné qu'une seule fois lors de ses quatorze matches contre le Brésil, toutes compétitions confondues.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.original_title: Legend and Legacy
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title: الأسطورة والإرث
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: كانت بطولة كأس العالم لكرة القدم في قطر أكثر من مجرد بطولة، فقد أعادت ضبط التوقعات.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Légende et héritage
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: Qatar’s FIFA World Cup was more than a tournament — it reset expectations. Elite football combined with preciseorganisation and a consistently welcoming environment, drawing fans from every continent.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: La Coupe du Monde de la FIFA au Qatar était plus qu’un tournoi : elle a redéfini les attentes.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: يتم بث جميع المباريات الـ 104 من كأس العالم FIFA 2026™ مباشرة وحصرياً على beIN SPORTS مع إمكانية الاختيار بين الاستوديو العربي والإنجليزية والفرنسية وتعليق المباريات.

beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc: ستكون هذه هي المرة الثانية التي تواجه فيها هولندا والمغرب في كأس العالم FIFA، حيث فاز الهولنديون 2-1 في مرحلة المجموعات عام 1994 بفضل هدفي دينيس بيركامب وبرايان روي.
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.title_fr: Pays-Bas vs Maroc - Coupe du Monde FIFA 2026 - Huitièmes de finale
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_en: This will be the second time that Netherlands and Morocco have faced at the FIFA World Cup, with the Dutch winning 2-1 in a group stage game in 1994 thanks to goals from Dennis Bergkamp and Bryan Roy. After beating Scotland in the group stages, Morocco are looking to win successive FIFA World Cup matches against European opposition for the first ti
beIN SPORTS MAX 1.desc_fr: Ce sera la deuxième fois que les Pays-Bas et le Maroc s'affronteront en Coupe du Monde de la FIFA, les Néerlandais s'étant imposés 2-1 lors d'un match de phase de groupes en 1994 grâce aux buts de Dennis Bergkamp et Bryan Roy.

beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Le Paris SG et le Bayern Munich se sont affrontés 15 fois en UEFA Champions League, et neuf fois au cours des neuf dernières campagnes.

beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Al Nassr (KSA) - Gamba Osaka (JPN) - AFC Champions League Two 2025/2026 - Finale
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en:
The AFC Champions League Two is the second-tier competition of Asian club football, ranked below the AFC Champions League Elite. 
Participation in the competition is open to clubs from the top 12 nations in the East and the West region based on the AFC club competitions ranking.
All games are live and exclusive only on beIN.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: L'AFC Champions League Two est la compétition de deuxième niveau du football de clubs asiatique, classée en dessous de l'AFC Champions League Elite.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
beIN SPORTS 1.title: لينس vs نيس - نهائي كأس فرنسا 2025
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: مباشر وحصري فقط على beIN، كأس فرنسا، والتي يشار إليها أيضًا باسم كأس فرنسا، هي المنافسة الأولى لكأس خروج المغلوب في كرة القدم الفرنسية والتي ينظمها الاتحاد الفرنسي لكرة القدم (FF).
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). The winner qualifies for the group stage of the UEFA Europa League and a place in the Trophée des Champions. Current champions are Paris saint Germain.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: En direct et en exclusivité uniquement sur beIN, la Coupe de France, également appelée Coupe de France, est la première compétition de coupe à élimination directe du football français organisée par la Fédération française de football (FF).

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs USMA (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - Finals

beIN SPORTS 1.desc: كأس الاتحاد الأفريقي هي مسابقة الدرجة الثانية لكرة القدم للأندية الأفريقية، وتحتل مرتبة أقل من دوري أبطال أفريقيا.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs USMA (ALG) - Coupe de la Confédération de la CAF 2025/26 - Finales
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: The CAF Confederation Cup is the second-tier competition of African club football, ranking below the CAF Champions League. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN. Current champions re RS Berkane from Morocco.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: La Coupe de la Confédération de la CAF est la compétition de deuxième niveau du football interclubs africain, se classant en dessous de la Ligue des Champions de la CAF.

A train journey, full of history, emotions and surprises, that not only reveals the preparation for the World cup but also how football ca

beIN SPORTS 8.title_fr: New York vs Golden State – Association nationale de Basketball féminine – WNBA
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_en: The 2026 season marks the league’s 30th campaign, running from 8 May to 24 September, with 15 teams following the addition of Portland Fire and Toronto Tempo. The competition features elite women’s basketball across the regular season and playoffs, as teams chase the championship in a growing league with expanded reach and rising global attention.
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_fr: La saison 2026 marque la 30e campagne de la ligue, se déroulant du 8 mai au 24 septembre, avec 15 équipes suite à l'ajout de Portland Fire et de Toronto Tempo.

beIN SPORTS 8.title: سباق - جولة سبيلبرج - كأس بورشه السوبر - 2026
التصفيات المؤهلة - موتو 2 - جولة هولندا
beIN SPORTS 8.desc: تتجه بطولة MotoGP إلى تايلاند في حلبة تشانغ الدولية في بوريرام، وهو مسار يتميز بمسارات مستقيمة طويلة ومناطق كبح شديدة وحرارة شديدة.
beIN SPORTS 8.desc_en: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demandin

beIN SPORTS 2.title_fr: Liverpool vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 Semaine 12 - Mini Match
beIN SPORTS 2.desc_en: Liverpool lost this exact fixture 1-0 last season, the only league game in which they failed to score all season. beIN SPORTS 9.title_fr: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Compétition par équipe
beIN SPORTS 9.desc_en: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. The schedule includes the Global Champions League team competition and the Grand Prix, with riders earning points toward the season standings. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.
